# Message

Project: [KeyShot | Performance Marketing](/2325709/projects/19095668)

### Auto-Generated Image on Display and Pmax

Posted by Bailey Liu on Mar 31, 2023

[![Bailey Liu](https://asset1.basecamp.com/2325709/people/18698287/photo/avatar.96.gif "Bailey Liu")](/2325709/people/18698287)

Hi Burak,   
  
We saw this ad on either our display remarketing or Pamx, I believe it's auto-generated by Google. Would you please turn the auto-gen function off? And let us know what additional images are needed so that we can provide them.   
  
Moving forward, let's not use the auto-generate images at all : )  
  
Thank you!   
  
 - Bailey.

Hi Bailey,   
  
As far as I see from your attached screenshot and after checking our campaigns, it's part of our Display remarketing or Pmax campaigns, *3D Rendering* Ad group. In this ad group, we were using Responsive display ads with the approved ad copies and the provided images shared earlier ( <https://www.dropbox.com/sh/4ims756o105ia8a/AAC9NuO9wyt2en-wQTH6mZo2a?dl=0> )

Regards,  
Fathy
